# Arkit Karmokar

> Arkit Karmokar is a Full Stack Developer from Ulhasnagar, Maharashtra, India, building SaaS platforms and distributed systems. He specializes in Next.js, TypeScript, Python/Django and PostgreSQL, with deep work in AI/RAG systems, LLM integration, and high-throughput infrastructure. Tagline: "I build software that feels effortless."

## About

Full Stack Developer specializing in SaaS platforms and distributed systems — from automation platforms that resolve direct business friction to high-throughput internal infrastructure. Focused on shipping high-impact tools that perform smoothly under load and adapt within modern enterprise ecosystems. Also works as a Developer, Builder, Designer, and AI Engineer.

## Skills

- Languages & frameworks: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, HTML/CSS, React.js & Next.js, Node.js & Express.js, Bun.js & Hono.js, Django
- Data & infra: PostgreSQL & MongoDB, Docker, AWS, Redis & Celery
- Systems & AI: System Design, RAG Architecture, LLM Integration, Churn Mitigation, HRMS Infrastructure, Agile Sprints

## Experience

- Optiminastic — Full Stack Developer (Feb 2026 – Present, Remote): Built an enterprise internal HR Management Platform (recruitment workflows, candidate tracking, automated onboarding). Engineered a full-stack SaaS engine monitoring website visibility across multi-model AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini) with Shopify Remix Apps and WordPress Plugins. Analytics pipeline in Python/Django and Next.js with Celery and PostgreSQL.
- Cinemate AI — Founding Engineer / Consultant (Sept 2025 – Jan 2026, Mumbai): Co-designed a filmmaking discovery platform. Built high-performance Next.js backend with SSR, optimized PostgreSQL schemas and connection pooling, and operational RAG pipelines using LangChain for document embeddings and real-time vector indexing.

## Projects

- Shepherd — Production-readiness auditing tool that catches the failure modes AI code generators leave behind (missing auth, cost-bombs, outdated patterns), with deterministic security/architecture scans and Claude Code/MCP integration. https://github.com/Arkit-k/shepherd
- WindbackAI — B2B retention platform that minimizes subscription churn and recovers failed-transaction revenue using autonomous AI win-back sequences; PII encryption, RBAC, Redis queues, Docker on Render.
- BrowzyAI — Browser extension enhancing navigation with companion tools; JavaScript extension layers on Python systems via Gemini API with native NLU.
- 100xdevs Ecosystem — Production framework across Next.js (TypeScript), PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, and Web3/Solana.

## Education

- University of Mumbai — B.Sc. in Information Technology (Apr 2021 – May 2024). Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Computer Systems, Software Engineering, Database Systems.
